3089830.name: Doghouse 3
3089830.description:
Synopsis


Doghouse 3 is a Casual Adventure game that takes place in your backyard. As you're working away building a doghouse for your beloved pet, over time, you notice that your dog looks.. different.

You may have to think through puzzles and time out your day in order to achieve one of multiple endings in this game. It's a race against nightfall, when your dog's patience wears thin. Will you survive?

Features


  • Multiple Endings
  • Easter Eggs
  • A Rich, Deep Story
  • An Item Interaction System
  • A Changing Environment System
  • Snarky Quips
  • Dog

Developer Note


This game is the final part of the Doghouse series of games; the story is standalone, and there is no need to play any of the other installments in the series.

英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
